error_signature: Xano Auth doesn't log in user after account creation
title: Xano Auth fails to log in user after account creation
symptom: When using Google login, the user account is created in Xano, but the user is not logged in. This results in a failed login experience despite account creation.
applies_when: Using Google login with Xano Auth
not_this_if: User table is correctly named as 'user'
root_cause: The Xano Auth integration relies on a specific naming convention for the user table. Renaming the table from 'user' to 'users' disrupts the login process, causing the system to create an account without logging in the user.
fix_steps: Test the Google login again to ensure it works
agent_instruction: Rename the Xano user table back to 'user' to restore login functionality.
